recommendations.title: Win It All
recommendations.overview: A gambling addict faces a conflict when entrusted with keeping a bunch of money that isn't his.

recommendations.title: Drinking Buddies
recommendations.overview: Weekend trips, office parties, late night conversations, drinking on the job, marriage pressure, biological clocks, holding eye contact a second too long… you know what makes the line between “friends” and “more than friends” really blurry? Beer.

recommendations.title: Digging for Fire
recommendations.overview: Tim and Lee are married with a young child. The chance to stay at a fancy home in the Hollywood Hills is complicated by Tim's discovery of a bone and a rusty old gun in the yard. Tim is excited by the idea of a mystery, but Lee doesn't want him to di

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: Banana Split
recommendations.overview: After a messy breakup with her high school boyfriend, April strikes up an unexpected friendship with his new girlfriend, Clara.

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: The Asadas!
recommendations.overview: Masashi is a photographer. He has his parents and an older brother Yukihiro. Through the 2011 Tohoku earthquake and tsunami, Masashi begins to take staged photos of his family.

recommendations.title: Je Tu Il Elle
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a subdued psychological breakdown in the wake of a devastating breakup.
